# Alignment Plan

## User Intent

Describe the user's original goal in the user's terms.

## Polished Goal

State the goal in execution-ready form.

## Scope

List what is included.

## Non-goals

List what is intentionally excluded.

| Source | Location / Access | Needed For | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Website / doc |  |  | missing / provided / verified |

| Metric / validation command |  |  | missing / provided / verified |

## Agent Propose QA

| Confirmation | User Response |
|---|---|
| So the intended goal is ... correct? |  |
| The expected output is ... correct? |  |
| The source list is complete enough to execute, correct? |  |
| These constraints and non-goals are correct? |  |

## Execution Strategy

Describe the first executable phases.

## Validation And Evidence

Define what evidence proves progress and completion.

## Autonomy Boundaries

State what the agent may do without asking and what requires user confirmation.
